languages.text: Grants +10 Weapon Skill. Whenever a Chaos Daemon hits an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to Fellowship, or a +5 bonus if the attack scores a critical hit. Stacks. Lasts until the end of combat.

languages.text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}. Whenever a summoned daemon {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, or a +5 bonus if the attack scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, lasting until the end of combat. Stacks.

languages.text: Персонаж получает +10 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнему Бою{/g}. Когда призванный им демон {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадает{/g} по врагу, персонаж до конца боя получает +1 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительности{/g}. Если это попадание {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое{/g}, прибавка составляет +5. Суммируется.

languages.text: L'utilisateur gagne un bonus de +10 à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}. Lorsqu'un démon invoqué {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touche{/g} un ennemi, l'utilisateur bénéficie jusqu'à la fin du combat d'un bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sociabilité{/g} de +1 ou de +5 si l'attaque inflige un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g}. Cumulable.
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}. Whenever a summoned daemon {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, or a +5 bonus if the attack scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, lasting until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur gagne un bonus de +10 à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}. Lorsqu'un démon invoqué {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touche{/g} un ennemi, l'utilisateur bénéficie jusqu'à la fin du combat d'un bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sociabilité{/g} de +1 ou de +5 si l'attaque inflige un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g}. Cumulable.

languages.text: Giyen kişi, +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g} kazanır. Çağrılan bir iblis, bir düşmana {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurduğunda{/g} takan kişi, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sosyallik{/g} niteliğine +1 bonus kazanır. Saldırı, {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} indirirse bu bonus +5'e dönüşür. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

Stacks.

Saldırı, {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} indirirse bu bonus +5'e dönüşür. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

languages.text: 装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}提高10点。被召唤恶魔每次{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}敌人，装备者获得1点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}社交{/g}加值（造成{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}则改为获得5点），持续至战斗结束。效果可叠加。
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}. Whenever a summoned daemon {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, or a +5 bonus if the attack scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, lasting until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text: 装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}提高10点。被召唤恶魔每次{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}敌人，装备者获得1点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}社交{/g}加值（造成{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}则改为获得5点），持续至战斗结束。效果可叠加。

languages.text: El portador obtiene +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g}. Cada vez que un daemon invocado {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}golpee{/g} a un enemigo, el portador recibe una bonificación de +1 a la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Empatía{/g} (+5 si logra asestar un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g}) que durará hasta el final del combate. Este efecto es acumulativo.
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}. Whenever a summoned daemon {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, or a +5 bonus if the attack scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, lasting until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text: El portador obtiene +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g}. Cada vez que un daemon invocado {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}golpee{/g} a un enemigo, el portador recibe una bonificación de +1 a la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Empatía{/g} (+5 si logra asestar un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g}) que durará hasta el final del combate. Este efecto es acumulativo.

languages.text: Der Träger erhält +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g}. Wenn ein gerufener Dämon einen Gegner {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}trifft{/g}, erhält der Träger einen Bonus von +1 auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Gefolgschaft{/g} oder einem Bonus von +5, wenn der Angriff einen {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g} erzielt. Der Effekt bleibt bis zum Ende des Kampfes bestehen. Stapelbar.
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}. Whenever a summoned daemon {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, or a +5 bonus if the attack scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, lasting until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text: Der Träger erhält +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g}. Wenn ein gerufener Dämon einen Gegner {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}trifft{/g}, erhält der Träger einen Bonus von +1 auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Gefolgschaft{/g} oder einem Bonus von +5, wenn der Angriff einen {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g} erzielt. Der Effekt bleibt bis zum Ende des Kampfes bestehen. Stapelbar.

languages.text: 装備者は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器スキル{/g}+10を得る。召喚されたデーモンが敵を{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}した時、装備者は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}魅力{/g}+1のボーナスを得る。攻撃が{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット{/g}になると、このボーナスは2倍になる。
